textPlain: This looks great, but my current app is entirely written in and designed to run on Node. Pity, because I'm currently preplanning the frontend and was trying to decide if I was gonna use a framework and which one. I would prefer a minimal one like this, but the Bun thing is probably a dealbreaker.Good luck though! It looks great!
Can someone ELI5 what Nue is in terms of its competitor?
